tests_run: bash --noprofile --norc -lc 'source scripts/codex-preflight.sh && declare -F preflight_repo preflight_js preflight_py preflight_rust'
bash --noprofile --norc -lc 'set +e; source scripts/codex-preflight.sh; preflight_repo >/tmp/ralph_preflight_repo.txt 2>&1; code=$?; echo exit:$code; tail -n 25 /tmp/ralph_preflight_repo.txt'
human_verification: Reviewed the preflight script diff, confirmed source-safe wrapper functions are present, verified preflight_repo passes when sourced with --mode off, and confirmed the branch-specific test suite stayed green through completion.
notes: Redirected UV_CACHE_DIR to /tmp/uv-cache-ralph to avoid the root-owned default cache path, then completed the full pytest suite successfully.
